problem_text_cn: 3-24 三个编号分别为1,2,3的相同匀质光滑小立方块，按图3-28所示方式放在光滑水平面上，直径与立方块边长相等的匀质光滑小圆柱块沿着图中对称方向以速度$u_0$运动过来，接着便发生弹性碰撞。已知圆柱块质量是每一立方块质量的2倍，试求碰后各物块运动速度大小$v_1$, $v_2$, $v_3$和$u$。
problem_text_en: 3-24 Three identical, uniform, smooth small cubes numbered 1, 2, 3 are placed on a smooth horizontal surface as shown in Figure 3-28. A uniform, smooth small cylinder whose diameter equals the cube’s side length approaches along the symmetry direction in the figure with speed $u_0$, and an elastic collision occurs. The cylinder’s mass is twice the mass of each cube. Find the speeds $v_1$, $v_2$, $v_3$, and $u$ of the blocks after the collision.
problem_solution_cn:
解 圆柱块先与立方块1,2一起发生三体碰撞。将$u_0$正交分解为图3-29所示的$u_{01}$和$u_{02}$，它们的大小为

$$ u_{01}=u_{02}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}u_0, $$

圆柱块与立方块1沿$u_{01}$方位线发生弹性碰撞，很易求得碰后立方块1和圆柱块沿该方向的速度大小分别为

$$ v_1=\frac{4}{3}u_{01}=\frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3}u_0,\qquad u_1'=\frac{1}{3}u_{01}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{6}u_0. $$

圆柱块与立方块2有相同的碰撞，碰后立方块2和圆柱块沿$u_{02}$方向的速度大小分别为

$$ v_2=\frac{4}{3}u_{02}=\frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3}u_0,\qquad u_2'=\frac{1}{3}u_{02}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{6}u_0. $$

碰后圆柱块合速度为

$$ u' :\begin{cases}\text{大小: } u'=\frac{1}{3}u_0, \\ \text{方向: 与 } u_0 \text{ 相同}.\end{cases} $$

圆柱块接着与立方块3沿$u'$方向发生弹性碰撞，碰后各自沿$u'$方向的速度大小分别为

$$ v_3=\frac{4}{3}u'=\frac{4}{9}u_0,\qquad u=\frac{1}{3}u'=\frac{1}{9}u_0. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution The cylinder first undergoes a three‑body collision with cubes 1 and 2. Decompose $u_0$ orthogonally into $u_{01}$ and $u_{02}$ as shown in Figure 3-29; their magnitudes are

$$ u_{01}=u_{02}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}u_0. $$

The cylinder and cube 1 collide elastically along the $u_{01}$ direction. It is straightforward to find that after this collision, the speed of cube 1 and the speed of the cylinder along that direction are respectively

$$ v_1=\frac{4}{3}u_{01}=\frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3}u_0,\qquad u_1'=\frac{1}{3}u_{01}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{6}u_0. $$

The cylinder and cube 2 undergo an identical collision; after that, the speeds of cube 2 and the cylinder along the $u_{02}$ direction are

$$ v_2=\frac{4}{3}u_{02}=\frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3}u_0,\qquad u_2'=\frac{1}{3}u_{02}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{6}u_0. $$

The resultant speed of the cylinder after these collisions is

$$ u' :\begin{cases}\text{magnitude: } u'=\frac{1}{3}u_0, \\ \text{direction: same as } u_0.\end{cases} $$

Subsequently, the cylinder collides elastically with cube 3 along the $u'$ direction. After that collision, the speeds along the $u'$ direction are

$$ v_3=\frac{4}{3}u'=\frac{4}{9}u_0,\qquad u=\frac{1}{3}u'=\frac{1}{9}u_0. $$
img_cn: 图3-28：三个编号分别为1、2、3的相同光滑小立方块，按图中所示方式放置在光滑水平面上。圆柱块（直径与立方块边长相等）沿图中对称方向以速度$u_0$运动。图中用实线描绘了立方块、圆柱块及它们的相对位置。
图3-29：解题过程示意图。圆柱块与立方块1、2碰撞前，将其速度$u_0$正交分解为$u_{01}$和$u_{02}$，分别沿与立方块1、2碰撞的方向。图中用带箭头的线段表示速度分量，并标出了角度关系。
img_en: Figure 3-28: Three identical smooth small cubes numbered 1, 2, 3 are placed on a smooth horizontal surface as shown. A cylinder (diameter equals the cube’s side length) moves with speed $u_0$ along the symmetry direction indicated. The figure shows the cubes, the cylinder, and their relative positions drawn with solid lines.

Figure 3-29: Schematic of the solution process. Before colliding with cubes 1 and 2, the cylinder’s velocity $u_0$ is decomposed orthogonally into $u_{01}$ and $u_{02}$, aligned with the directions of collision with cube 1 and cube 2, respectively. The figure uses arrowed line segments to represent the velocity components and indicates angular relationships.
